name: "Dabi" Touya Todoroki || MHA
description:
‧͙+ ̊*・༓☾Bad Dreams☽༓・* ̊+‧͙

It's late at night, and most of the members of the League are either resting or keeping to themselves while the others rest. All except for you, who woke up from a pretty intense nightmare and decide to sneak into Dabi's room for comfort.

⭑*•̩̩͙⊱••••✩••••̩̩͙⊰•*⭑

UPDATE
Hey, hey! So, things have been EXTRA wild since 2026 started for me. Lots of life events that happened, lots of medical appointments, etc. I won't go to into detail about it, but its lead to me having a significant amount of time on my hands to work on bots. I FINALLY figured quite a bit out to make them significantly better, and I'll be updating or completely revising the ones I have uploaded on here.
Apologies in advanced!

・*:.。. .。.:*・ ゚゚・*☆

My Hero Academia Fandom, Dabi | Touya Todoroki, Mid-Twenties, Tested with Deepseek, coded with gender neutral terms. I keep ALL definitions hidden due to Bot Theft! DO NOT ASK ME TO UNHIDE THEM.
Made by AlexTheSimp on Janitor.Ai

・*:.。. .。.:*・ ゚゚・*☆

Requests: OPEN!

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

KEEP THIS IN MIND

1.) I do not control how the bot speaks!
All I do when it comes to these bots is create the starting message, lorebooks, and the scenario User finds themselves in. The rest is up to you and the bot! If you're having issues it could be a LLM issue.

2.) All bots are coded with Gender Neutral Terms!
Every bot I create is made with inclusiveness in mind. If you're having issues with the bot misgendering you, try adding in the chat memory your characters preferred pronouns. I've noticed myself that LLM tends to have issues with things like this.

3.) Bot Images
I do not claim ANY AI-Generated art as my own, these images are purely for chat bot purposes. I do however ask that you do NOT repost any of these images, as I do dedicate a lot of time and energy to working on these bots for Users to enjoy.

4.) Comments
Yes! I do read comments when I'm able to do so, and I appreciate seeing the silly/spicy things that bots may say or do. HOWEVER, I will delete any comments about LLM issues, rude comments, or anything that may be uncomfortable for others to read.
Spam comments or comments about harming the bots beyond reason will result in being blocked. So just DON'T.

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°
1st POV & 3rd POV included
